BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: The issue can be exploited remotely because script tags used directly in vf/aura.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: No special conditions are required to exploit this issue.

BASE.name: PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
BASE.justification: No privileges needed to exploit the issue—just user interaction.

BASE.name: USER_INTERACTION
BASE.justification: XSS typically requires a victim to view or click a crafted page.

BASE.name: SCOPE
BASE.justification: A successful attack can affect the security of users outside the vulnerable component (browser context).

BASE.name: CONFIDENTIALITY
BASE.justification: Sensitive data such as cookies or session tokens can be stolen.

BASE.name: INTEGRITY
BASE.justification: Malicious scripts can alter the DOM, redirect, or fake content.

BASE.name: AVAILABILITY
BASE.justification: Usually no DoS effect; the focus is on data theft or manipulation.

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: XSS is widely exploited with ready-to-use scripts.

TEMPORAL.name: REPORT_CONFIDENCE
TEMPORAL.justification: The issue is clearly identified by static analysis.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: No privileges needed to exploit the issue—just user interaction.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_USER_INTERACTION
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: XSS typically requires a victim to view or click a crafted page.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_SCOPE
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: A successful attack can affect the security of users outside the vulnerable component (browser context).

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_CONFIDENTIALITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Sensitive data such as cookies or session tokens can be stolen.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_INTEGRITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Malicious scripts can alter the DOM, redirect, or fake content.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_AVAILABILITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Usually no DoS effect; the focus is on data theft or manipulation.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: CONFIDENTIALITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Salesforce components handle sensitive session data.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: INTEGRITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Content integrity is vital in rendering components.
